quotes.verbatim_quote: By adding a7th to the Augmented chord you get still another sound (See Exercise 43).
quotes.why_load_bearing: Defines the Augmented 7th chord as Augmented triad plus a 7th.

quotes.verbatim_quote:
many chords are used that don't ap-
pear in the original chord structure ofa song. They are used to add color and originality.
quotes.why_load_bearing: States the governing rule for why Augmented cycles and substitute chords are introduced.
